description: Composition White and red shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered brand logo and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton and designed with cuts that offer a flattering silhouette, this shirt from highlander is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans, throw over a blazer and slip into suede boots or sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
